116 shopping lists / the lists / about / shop amazon

Best Selling Crocs Sandals & Slides

Classic Crocs Clogs

1. Crocs Classic Clog

Price: ~$40-55

Iconic design with ventilation holes for breathability and Jibbitz customization. Convertible backstrap for secure fit or relaxed slide styling. Water-friendly Croslite material dries quickly and resists odors.

2. Crocs Literide Clog

Price: ~$50-65

Next-generation Literide foam provides softer, lighter comfort. 40% softer and 25% lighter than traditional Crocs clogs. 360-degree comfort with sink-in softness for all-day wear.

3. Crocs Bistro Clog Work Shoe

Price: ~$35-50

Slip-resistant Crocs Lock tread for workplace safety compliance. Fully enclosed toe and heel design protects feet. Easy to clean material perfect for food service and healthcare workers.

Crocs Sandals & Slides

4. Crocs Classic Sandal

Price: ~$25-35

Two adjustable straps provide customizable secure fit. Waterproof design perfect for pool, beach, and water activities. Signature Croslite cushioning absorbs impact with every step.

5. Crocs Kadee II Flip Flop

Price: ~$20-30

Slim flip-flop design with Crocs comfort technology. Contoured footbed provides arch support for extended wear. Lightweight construction makes packing for travel effortless.

6. Crocs Sloane Slide Sandal

Price: ~$30-40

Platform slide with contemporary styling for everyday wear. Croslite foam cushioning provides cloud-like comfort. Dual Crocs Comfort rating for superior softness underfoot.

Specialty Crocs Styles

7. Crocs Brooklyn Low Wedge

Price: ~$40-55

TikTok viral style with subtle wedge heel elevation. Three colors available with feminine, comfortable design. Lightweight Croslite material with Crocs cushioning technology.

8. Crocs Bayaband Clog

Price: ~$35-45

Bold marbled midsole adds contemporary aesthetic flair. Convertible heel strap for clog or slide versatility. Customizable with Jibbitz charms for personal expression.

9. Crocs Echo Clog

Price: ~$70-85

Fashion-forward silhouette with exaggerated tooling details. Premium styling meets classic Crocs comfort technology. Limited availability makes it collector-worthy for Crocs enthusiasts.

Water & Sport Sandals

10. Crocs Swiftwater Sandal

Price: ~$35-50

Athletic design with mesh panels for enhanced breathability. Adjustable closures provide secure fit during activities. Flexible midsole moves naturally with foot motion.

11. Crocs Swiftwater Wave Flip

Price: ~$28-38

Water-friendly flip-flop with sporty athletic styling. Textured footbed provides traction when wet. Siped outsole channels water away for improved grip.

12. Crocs Baya Flip

Price: ~$18-28

Budget-friendly flip-flop with essential Crocs comfort. Thong-style design in multiple color options. Croslite foam construction provides cushioning and support.

Platform & Fashion Styles

13. Crocs Classic Platform Clog

Price: ~$55-70

Bold 1.5-inch platform elevates classic clog styling. Statement-making design with signature Crocs comfort. Ventilation holes and Jibbitz compatibility maintained.

14. Crocs Stomp Slide

Price: ~$45-60

Chunky platform slide with 2.6-inch height elevation. Fashion-forward design inspired by ’90s aesthetic trends. Exaggerated tooling and bold proportions make style statement.

15. Crocs Pool Slide

Price: ~$30-40

Simple slip-on design with chunky platform construction. Signature holes provide ventilation and drainage. Open-toe silhouette perfect for poolside relaxation.

Lined & Warm Weather Options

16. Crocs Classic Lined Clog

Price: ~$50-65

Fuzzy liner adds warmth for cooler weather wear. Classic clog silhouette with cozy interior comfort. Convertible strap offers slide or secure-fit styling.

17. Crocs Baya Clog

Price: ~$35-45

Streamlined design without ventilation holes for sleeker look. Contoured footbed provides anatomical arch support. Versatile style transitions from indoor to outdoor easily.

18. Crocs All Terrain Atlas

Price: ~$60-75

Rugged outdoor clog with enhanced traction outsole. Adjustable turbo heel strap secures foot during activities. Water-friendly design handles rivers, trails, and adventures.

Kids & Family Matching

19. Crocs Kids Classic Clog

Price: ~$30-40

Youth sizing with same comfort technology as adult versions. Customizable with Jibbitz charms for personal style expression. Easy on/off design perfect for independent children.

20. Crocs Toddler Classic Clog

Price: ~$25-35

Toddler sizes with secure heel strap for active play. Lightweight design won’t weigh down small feet. Water-friendly material simplifies cleanup after messy play.

Key Features to Consider:

  • Croslite Material: Proprietary closed-cell resin provides cushioning, support, and odor resistance while remaining lightweight and water-friendly.
  • Sizing: Crocs typically run roomy; size down for snug fit, true-to-size for relaxed fit, up for wearing with thick socks.
  • Ventilation: Classic clogs feature holes for breathability and drainage, while solid designs offer sleeker appearance without ventilation.
  • Heel Strap: Convertible straps rotate forward for slide styling or back for secure fit during walking and activities.
  • Jibbitz Compatibility: Ventilation holes accept Jibbitz charms for customization and personal expression (not available on solid designs).
  • Platform Height: Standard clogs sit flat, platform versions add 1.5-2.6 inches for fashion-forward elevation and presence.
  • Use Case: Classic clogs suit all-purpose wear, work styles offer slip-resistance, sport sandals provide athletic support, fashion platforms make style statements.

All prices are approximate and may vary based on sales and availability.

Best Selling Area Rugs & Carpets

Washable & Easy-Care Rugs

1. Ophanie Fluffy Shag Area Rug 4x6

Price: ~$25-35

Non-slip backing keeps rug securely in place on hardwood and tile. Soft plush material provides comfortable barefoot walking. Machine washable for easy cleaning and maintenance.

2. OLANLY Washable Area Rug 4x5.9ft

Price: ~$30-40

Machine washable design simplifies cleaning and upkeep. Soft fluffy shaggy texture creates cozy bedroom atmosphere. Non-slip backing prevents sliding on smooth floors.

3. Soalmost Washable 8x10 Area Rug

Price: ~$80-110

Large 8x10 size perfect for living rooms and dining areas. Vintage beige design complements farmhouse and traditional decor. Stain-resistant material handles high-traffic areas with ease.

4. RELEANY Washable 5’x7’ Modern Abstract Rug

Price: ~$45-60

Modern abstract pattern adds contemporary flair to any room. Non-slip backing provides safety for families with children and pets. Machine washable for convenient maintenance.

5. GENIMO 5X7 Washable Vintage Rug

Price: ~$50-65

Low-pile chenille construction resists shedding and matting. Vintage distressed pattern suits farmhouse and bohemian styles. Lightweight design makes moving and cleaning simple.

Size & Style Options

6. CHAMPLANT Washable Rug 4x6 Vintage Gray

Price: ~$35-45

Vintage traditional pattern suits farmhouse and classic decor. Foldable thin design fits easily in washing machines. Non-slip backing with distressed floral print adds character.

7. Srugn Washable 8x10 Ultra Soft Faux Wool

Price: ~$90-120

Retro print with non-shedding low-pile construction. Ultra-soft faux wool texture mimics expensive wool rugs. Non-slip backing prevents movement on hardwood and tile.

8. AMADA Washable 8x10 Low-Profile Rug

Price: ~$85-110

Low-profile design with durable edge binding resists fraying. Non-slip backing stays put without rug pad needed. Vintage large rug suitable for living room and bedroom.

9. Nakagishi 5x7 Washable Boho Area Rug

Price: ~$40-55

Moroccan-inspired pattern adds bohemian flair. Stain-resistant fabric handles spills and pet accidents. Farmhouse-neutral colors complement various decor styles.

10. 8x10 Washable Vintage Floral Rug

Price: ~$95-125

Vintage floral design with distressed finish adds character. Stain-resistant material perfect for high-traffic areas. Non-slip backing with durable construction.

Key Features to Consider:

  • Washability: Machine-washable rugs simplify cleaning for homes with pets, children, or high traffic, though large sizes (8x10+) require commercial washers.
  • Pile Height: Low-pile (0.25 inch) rugs fit under doors and vacuum easily, while high-pile shag rugs (1+ inch) offer luxury softness.
  • Material: Synthetic fibers resist stains and cost less, while natural fibers like wool and jute provide premium texture and durability.
  • Backing Type: Non-slip rubber backing prevents sliding on hard floors, though rug pads offer superior grip and floor protection.
  • Pattern & Color: Light colors brighten spaces but show dirt, dark colors hide stains but may make rooms feel smaller.
  • Size Selection: Measure your space allowing 18-24 inches between rug edges and walls for proper proportions in living areas.
  • Indoor/Outdoor Use: Polypropylene and recycled plastic rugs withstand moisture and UV exposure for patios and covered porches.

All prices are approximate and may vary based on sales and availability.

Best Selling Winter Scarves

Cashmere & Luxury Scarves

1. State Cashmere 100% Pure Cashmere Scarf

Price: ~$49-69

Ultra-soft 100% cashmere with classic size 12x72 inches. Hypoallergenic and lightweight warmth. Heather grey premium scarf.

2. Johnstons of Elgin Cashmere Scarf

Price: ~$149-199

Scottish cashmere with woven tartan patterns. 75x12 inches with fringe details. Heritage plaid luxury scarf.

3. Plum Feathers Super Soft Cashmere Feel Scarf

Price: ~$14-19

Cashmere-like acrylic blend with large 78x28 inches. Multiple solid colors available. Navy budget luxury-feel scarf.

4. White + Warren Travel Wrap Scarf

Price: ~$98-128

100% cashmere oversized 40x80 inches. Doubles as shawl or blanket for travel. Heather charcoal versatile wrap.

Wool & Knit Scarves

5. Pendleton Eco-Wise Wool Scarf

Price: ~$49-65

Soft washable wool in signature patterns. 68x13 inches with fringe trim. Harding Oxford Pacific Northwest design.

6. Calvin Klein Logo Scarf Knit

Price: ~$32-42

Soft acrylic knit with woven CK logo. Classic oblong shape 72x10 inches. Black modern designer scarf.

7. Carhartt Knit Scarf

Price: ~$18-24

Stretchable rib-knit acrylic 64 inches long. Carhartt label with durable construction. Carhartt brown work scarf.

8. The North Face Salty Dog Etip Scarf

Price: ~$34-44

Soft knit with hidden zip pocket. 70 inches long with TNF logo. TNF black functional scarf.

Infinity & Loop Scarves

9. NEOSAN Infinity Scarf with Zipper Pocket

Price: ~$16-22

Hidden zipper pocket for phone and cash. Lightweight knit convertible design. Charcoal travel scarf.

10. MIRMARU Soft Warm Knitted Infinity Loop Scarf

Price: ~$13-18

Circle scarf with cable knit pattern. Two-loop wear with soft acrylic. Grey budget infinity scarf.

11. C.C Exclusives Soft Chunky Knit Infinity Scarf

Price: ~$16-21

Thick cable knit with oversized loop. Multiple color options available. Beige cozy circle scarf.

Fleece & Performance Scarves

12. Columbia Fast Trek Neck Gaiter

Price: ~$14-19

MTR fleece with pull-on tube design. Covers neck and can pull over face. Black versatile neck warmer.

13. Tough Headwear Fleece Neck Warmer

Price: ~$11-16

Double-layer fleece with 4-way stretch. Helmet-compatible ski neck gaiter. Black athletic neck tube.

14. Under Armour ColdGear Infrared Neck Gaiter

Price: ~$24-30

Soft fabric with infrared technology retains heat. Moisture-wicking with anti-odor. Black performance gaiter.

Blanket & Oversized Scarves

15. Women’s Tartan Blanket Scarf Wrap Shawl

Price: ~$18-25

Large 55x55 inches plaid pattern. Soft acrylic can wear multiple ways. Red/black oversized wrap scarf.

16. Sofiacashmere Oversized Scarf Wrap

Price: ~$44-59

Extra large 80x28 inches cashmere blend. Versatile shawl or blanket scarf. Camel neutral oversized scarf.

Key Features to Consider:

  • Material Warmth: Cashmere warmest and softest but delicate, wool durable natural insulation, acrylic affordable easy-care alternative, fleece athletic performance
  • Size & Length: 60-70 inches standard wrap-around length, 80+ inches for multiple loops, infinity scarves eliminate ends, oversized 50x50+ doubles as shawl
  • Weight Options: Lightweight scarves layer under coats, medium-weight versatile year-round, heavyweight chunky knits maximum warmth
  • Care Requirements: Cashmere dry clean or hand wash delicate, wool hand wash cold, acrylic machine washable, fleece easy machine care
  • Style Versatility: Solid colors match any outfit, patterns add visual interest, neutral tones (grey/black/camel) most practical
  • Functional Features: Hidden pockets secure valuables, convertible styles (scarf to infinity), neck gaiters pull over face, fringe adds decorative element
  • Budget Considerations: Acrylic $10-25 great value, wool blend $30-60 mid-range, cashmere $50-200+ luxury investment, cashmere-feel alternatives $15-25

All prices are approximate and may vary based on sales and availability.

Best Selling Kids Winter Jackets

Insulated Puffer Jackets

1. The North Face Youth Reversible Perrito Jacket

Price: ~$99-129

Reversible fleece and nylon with 550-fill down. Water-repellent DWR finish with zippered pockets. TNF black/grey versatile jacket.

2. Columbia Youth Powder Lite Hooded Jacket

Price: ~$54-74

Omni-Heat thermal reflective with water-resistant shell. Synthetic down insulation with attached hood. Black/purple lightweight puffer.

3. Amazon Essentials Kids Lightweight Puffer Jacket

Price: ~$29-39

Water-resistant with synthetic fill insulation. Full-zip with side pockets and elastic cuffs. Navy budget puffer jacket.

4. Tommy Hilfiger Boys Puffer Jacket

Price: ~$59-79

Classic logo with full-zip and attached hood. Lightweight polyester fill with zip pockets. Navy/red flagship puffer.

5. Wantdo Boy’s Thickened Down Jacket

Price: ~$44-59

80% duck down with detachable hood. Windproof water-resistant with fleece-lined pockets. Black warm winter coat.

Heavy-Duty Winter Coats

6. Carhartt Kids Sherpa Lined Jacket

Price: ~$69-89

Durable duck canvas with sherpa lining. Triple-stitched seams with multiple pockets. Carhartt brown workwear-style coat.

7. Columbia Kids Bugaboo II Fleece Interchange Jacket

Price: ~$84-109

3-in-1 system with zip-out fleece liner. Omni-Tech waterproof with Omni-Heat. Black/grey versatile winter system.

8. Arctix Youth Insulated Winter Jacket

Price: ~$39-54

ThermaTech insulation with adjustable cuffs. Water and wind resistant with zippered pockets. Navy/grey budget winter coat.

3-in-1 & Convertible Jackets

9. Swiss Alps Kids 3-in-1 Winter Jacket

Price: ~$49-69

Waterproof shell with removable fleece jacket. Wear separately or together for versatility. Black/blue system jacket.

10. The North Face Youth Resolve Reflective Jacket

Price: ~$74-94

Waterproof DryVent with reflective details. Packable into own pocket with attached hood. TNF black safety jacket.

11. Hiheart Boys 3-in-1 Interchange Jacket

Price: ~$54-74

Fleece liner zips into waterproof shell. Windproof with multiple pockets and adjustable features. Navy versatile system.

Ski & Snowboard Jackets

12. Burton Kids Covert Jacket

Price: ~$119-149

DRYRIDE waterproof with Living Lining regulates temperature. Room-to-Grow sleeves extend 1.5 inches. True black ski jacket.

13. Outdoor Master Kids Ski Jacket

Price: ~$59-79

Waterproof 10K with snow skirt and powder cuffs. Multiple pockets with ski pass holder. Orange/black snowboard jacket.

Lightweight & Packable Jackets

14. Amazon Essentials Kids Full-Zip Polar Fleece Jacket

Price: ~$16-24

Soft polar fleece with full-zip and side pockets. Lightweight for layering under heavier coats. Navy budget fleece.

15. Uniqlo Kids Ultra Light Down Jacket

Price: ~$39-49

Packable down with water-repellent finish. Extremely lightweight with stuff sack. Red travel-friendly puffer.

16. Columbia Youth Steens Mountain II Fleece

Price: ~$24-34

Classic MTR filament fleece with full-zip. Zippered hand pockets and binding at cuffs. Black layering fleece jacket.

Key Features to Consider:

  • Insulation Type: Down provides best warmth-to-weight ratio, synthetic maintains warmth when wet, fleece breathable for active kids
  • Fill Power: 550-fill adequate for moderate cold, 650-700 fill for very cold, 800+ fill premium lightweight warmth
  • Waterproof Rating: 5K adequate for light snow, 10K standard winter protection, 15K+ for heavy snow and skiing
  • Growth Features: Adjustable cuffs extend sleeves, room-to-grow systems add 1-2 inches, buy one size up for longevity
  • Safety Elements: Reflective strips improve visibility, bright colors easier to spot, ID labels inside jacket helpful
  • Layering System: 3-in-1 jackets offer maximum versatility, shell + fleece combinations adapt to temperatures, base layers underneath
  • Activity Level: Heavy insulation for sedentary play, lighter fill for active kids who generate heat, vents prevent overheating

All prices are approximate and may vary based on sales and availability.

Best Selling Kids Winter Hats

Fleece-Lined Beanies for Kids

1. Simple Joys by Carter’s Toddler Winter Hat 4-Pack

Price: ~$16-22

Soft knit beanies with fleece lining for warmth. Stretchy fit for ages 2-4 years. Multi-color pack value set.

2. Columbia Youth Whirlibird Watch Cap

Price: ~$14-19

Omni-Heat thermal reflective lining with fleece. One size fits most youth. Black quality outdoor beanie.

3. Carhartt Kids Acrylic Watch Hat

Price: ~$12-17

Stretchable rib-knit acrylic with fold-up cuff. Carhartt label sewn on front. Carhartt brown durable beanie.

4. The North Face Youth Box Logo Beanie

Price: ~$19-25

Classic beanie with woven logo patch. Soft acrylic knit for warmth. TNF black youth winter hat.

5. Amazon Essentials Kids Winter Beanie 2-Pack

Price: ~$11-16

Soft knit with stretchy fit for toddlers and kids. Value 2-pack in solid colors. Budget-friendly winter hats.

Pom Pom & Character Hats

6. Disney Frozen Elsa Winter Hat and Gloves Set

Price: ~$14-19

Knit beanie with Elsa graphics and pom pom. Matching gloves included in set. Purple and blue character hat.

7. Marvel Spider-Man Kids Winter Hat

Price: ~$12-17

Beanie with 3D Spider-Man design and pom. Acrylic knit for ages 4-7. Red and black superhero hat.

8. Paw Patrol Kids Winter Hat with Pom

Price: ~$11-16

Knit cap with Chase and Marshall graphics. Soft pom pom on top for toddlers. Blue character beanie.

9. JoJo Siwa Girls Winter Beanie with Bow

Price: ~$13-18

Pink knit hat with signature bow and sequins. Warm acrylic for kids 4-14. Sparkly character hat.

Trapper & Ear Flap Hats

10. N’Ice Caps Kids Sherpa Lined Trapper Hat

Price: ~$16-22

Fleece-lined with ear flaps and chin strap. Water-resistant outer shell. Black winter trapper for ages 3-7.

11. Connectyle Toddler Winter Hat Fleece Lined

Price: ~$13-18

Ear flap hat with velcro chin strap. Warm sherpa lining with cute animal designs. Navy blue toddler winter cap.

12. Jan & Jul Toddler Winter Hat Fleece Lined

Price: ~$19-25

Waterproof outer with cozy fleece lining. Ear flaps with adjustable chin strap. Charcoal grey premium toddler hat.

Baby & Infant Winter Hats

13. Zutano Cozie Fleece Baby Hat

Price: ~$12-17

Soft fleece with ear flaps and ties. Fits infants 0-24 months. Multiple colors available baby beanie.

14. Hudson Baby Fleece Lined Trapper Hats 2-Pack

Price: ~$14-19

Sherpa-lined with ear flaps and chin ties. Value 2-pack for babies 0-18 months. Unisex infant winter hats.

15. Carter’s Baby Winter Hat and Mittens Set

Price: ~$13-18

Microfleece with matching scratch mittens. Velcro chin strap for secure fit. Neutral colors infant set.

Key Features to Consider:

  • Age Sizing: Infant (0-12 months), toddler (1-3 years), little kids (4-7 years), big kids (8-14 years) - measure head circumference for best fit
  • Material Warmth: Fleece-lined provides maximum warmth, acrylic knit standard insulation, wool natural breathable warmth but may itch
  • Ear Coverage: Beanies cover ears when pulled down, ear flap hats secure with straps, trapper hats offer maximum protection
  • Washability: Machine washable essential for kids, fleece and acrylic easy care, wool may require hand washing or delicate cycle
  • Safety Features: Avoid long ties or drawstrings on infant hats, secure chin straps prevent loss, reflective elements improve visibility
  • Character vs Plain: Licensed characters engage young children, solid colors more versatile and grow with child, pom poms add playful touch
  • Water Resistance: Water-resistant outer shells protect from snow, fleece lining prevents moisture wicking, quick-dry materials ideal for active kids

All prices are approximate and may vary based on sales and availability.

Best Selling Kids Winter Gloves

Waterproof Insulated Gloves

1. Carhartt Kids Glove with Grip

Price: ~$16-22

Waterproof insert with Polytex palm for grip. Ultra Soft insulation with adjustable wrist strap. Black durable work-style gloves.

2. N’Ice Caps Kids Thinsulate Waterproof Gloves

Price: ~$14-19

40g Thinsulate with waterproof insert. Textured palm with elastic wrist. Black/grey warm winter gloves.

3. Columbia Youth Whirlibird Ski Gloves

Price: ~$24-32

Omni-Tech waterproof with Omni-Heat reflective. Reinforced palm with nose wipe. Black performance ski gloves.

4. Gordini Kids Gore-Tex III Junior Gloves

Price: ~$34-44

Gore-Tex waterproof insert with Megaloft insulation. Textured palm with wrist leash. Black premium winter gloves.

5. Igloos Kids Ski Gloves Waterproof

Price: ~$16-22

3M Thinsulate with waterproof membrane. Adjustable wrist strap with soft lining. Pink/blue budget ski gloves.

Fleece & Knit Gloves

6. The North Face Youth Denali Etip Glove

Price: ~$29-35

Recycled fleece with touchscreen compatible fingertips. Silicone grip palm with elastic wrist. TNF black tech gloves.

7. Amazon Essentials Kids Fleece Gloves 2-Pack

Price: ~$9-14

Soft fleece with elastic wrists. Value 2-pack in solid colors. Black/grey budget fleece gloves.

8. Simple Joys by Carter’s Knit Gloves 3-Pack

Price: ~$12-17

Stretchy knit with ribbed cuffs. Toddler sizing value 3-pack. Multi-color affordable gloves.

Mittens for Toddlers & Young Kids

9. Jan & Jul Toddler Mittens Waterproof

Price: ~$18-24

Stay-on design with long cuffs and adjustable straps. Waterproof with fleece lining. Navy premium toddler mittens.

10. Kombi Kids Snowball Mitt

Price: ~$22-28

Waterproof Aquabloc insert with Accu-Dri moisture wicking. Grippy PVC palm with wrist strap. Purple/pink warm mittens.

11. Therm Kids Waterproof Mittens with Clips

Price: ~$14-19

40g Thinsulate with waterproof shell. Mitten clips attach to jacket. Black budget winter mittens.

12. Carter’s Baby Fleece Mittens No-Scratch

Price: ~$8-13

Soft fleece with elastic wrists for babies. No-scratch design for infants 0-12 months. Multi-color baby mittens.

Convertible Glove/Mittens

13. N’Ice Caps Kids Converter Fingerless Glove

Price: ~$16-22

Flip-top mitten cover over fingerless gloves. Thinsulate warmth with touchscreen fingertips. Black convertible gloves.

14. Grand Sierra Kids Flip-Top Gloves

Price: ~$12-17

Mitten cover flips back to expose fingers. Fleece-lined with textured grip palm. Camo convertible gloves.

15. Knolee Kids Mitten Gloves 2-in-1

Price: ~$13-18

Half-finger gloves with flip mitten cover. Warm fleece lining with knit exterior. Pink/grey versatile gloves.

Key Features to Consider:

  • Gloves vs Mittens: Mittens warmer as fingers share heat, gloves allow better dexterity, convertible designs offer both benefits
  • Waterproof Membranes: Gore-Tex premium breathable waterproof, proprietary inserts adequate for snow play, none okay for dry cold
  • Insulation Weight: 40g Thinsulate standard warmth, 60-100g for very cold, 150g+ for extreme conditions or less active kids
  • Sizing Guidance: Measure hand circumference at widest point, allow room for growth but not too loose, check brand size charts
  • Stay-On Features: Long cuffs tuck into jacket sleeves, elastic/velcro wrist straps secure fit, jacket clips prevent loss
  • Grip Enhancement: Textured PVC palms help hold sleds and snowballs, silicone dots improve grip, reinforced areas increase durability
  • Age Considerations: Mittens easier for toddlers to put on, gloves better for kids 5+, scratch mittens for infants prevent face scratching

All prices are approximate and may vary based on sales and availability.

Best Selling Kids Winter Boots

Insulated Snow Boots for Kids

1. Sorel Youth Whitney II Short Boot

Price: ~$74-94

Waterproof with 200g insulation rated to -25°F. Lace-up with EVA footbed for comfort. Black premium kids snow boots.

2. Columbia Youth Powderbug Plus II Boot

Price: ~$39-54

Omni-Tech waterproof with 200g insulation. Easy pull-on loop with hook-and-loop strap. Black/red winter boots.

3. The North Face Youth Thermoball Lace Up Boot

Price: ~$79-99

ThermoBall Eco insulation with waterproof construction. Surface Control rubber outsole for traction. TNF black youth boots.

4. Kamik Kids Waterbug5 Snow Boot

Price: ~$44-59

Waterproof nylon with removable liner rated to -40°F. Adjustable snow collar with bungee lacing. Navy durable winter boots.

5. Northside Frosty Winter Boot

Price: ~$29-39

200g insulation with waterproof shell. Easy on/off with hook-and-loop closure. Purple budget snow boots.

Easy On/Off Pull-On Boots

6. Western Chief Kids Neoprene Snow Boot

Price: ~$34-44

100% waterproof with neoprene upper. Easy pull-on with handles and adjustable toggle. Black slip-on winter boots.

7. LONECONE Kids Rain and Snow Boots

Price: ~$39-49

Natural rubber waterproof with cotton lining. Easy pull-on handles with fun prints. Dinosaur/unicorn character boots.

8. Totes Kids Winter Boot with Zipper

Price: ~$32-42

Side zipper for easy on/off with bungee lacing. Water-resistant with faux fur collar. Black convenient winter boots.

Lightweight & Athletic Winter Boots

9. Merrell Kids Snow Quest Lite Boot

Price: ~$54-69

Waterproof leather and mesh with M Select WARM. Alternative closure with grippy outsole. Grey athletic snow boots.

10. Timberland Kids Chillberg Boot

Price: ~$69-89

Premium waterproof leather with 400g PrimaLoft. Bungee lacing with hook-and-loop strap. Wheat classic kids boots.

11. Stride Rite Made2Play Winter Boot

Price: ~$44-59

Machine washable with memory foam footbed. Water-resistant with easy closures. Navy/pink active kids boots.

Toddler & Baby Winter Boots

12. UGG Kids Neumel II Boot

Price: ~$89-109

Suede and wool with plush UGGpure lining. Lightweight EVA outsole for toddlers. Chestnut classic UGG boots.

13. Simple Joys by Carter’s Toddler Snow Boot

Price: ~$24-34

Faux fur lined with easy pull-on loops. Water-resistant for light snow play. Navy/pink budget toddler boots.

14. Columbia Toddler Rope Tow Waterproof Boot

Price: ~$34-44

Omni-Tech waterproof with 200g insulation. Hook-and-loop strap with pull loop. Black/green toddler snow boots.

15. Bogs Baby Boga Boot Waterproof

Price: ~$49-64

100% waterproof with Neo-Tech insulation. Easy pull-on handles rated to -10°F. Rainbow infant/toddler boots.

Key Features to Consider:

  • Temperature Rating: -10°F adequate for mild winters, -25°F for cold climates, -40°F for extreme conditions, consider activity level
  • Insulation Amount: 100g light for active kids, 200g standard winter warmth, 400g+ for extreme cold or standing activities
  • Waterproof vs Water-Resistant: Fully waterproof essential for deep snow, water-resistant sufficient for light snow and slush
  • Closure Type: Pull-on fastest for toddlers, hook-and-loop easy for young kids, laces with toggles best for older children
  • Traction Outsole: Deep lugs prevent slipping on ice, rubber compounds stay flexible in cold, avoid smooth soles on snow
  • Size Guidance: Order half size up for thick socks, allow 1/2” growing room, measure both feet as kids’ feet grow rapidly
  • Easy Care: Removable liners enable washing, synthetic materials dry faster than leather, machine washable options ideal for toddlers

All prices are approximate and may vary based on sales and availability.

Best Selling Adult Winter Hats

Classic Beanies

1. Carhartt Acrylic Watch Hat

Price: ~$14-19

Stretchable rib-knit acrylic with fold-up cuff. Carhartt label sewn on front. Carhartt brown classic work beanie.

2. The North Face Bones Recycled Beanie

Price: ~$26-32

100% recycled polyester with FlashDry technology. Medium fit with embroidered logo. TNF black sustainable beanie.

3. Columbia Whirlibird Watch Cap Beanie

Price: ~$16-22

Omni-Heat thermal reflective lining with fleece band. One size fits most adults. Black warm winter hat.

4. Timberland Essential Solid Watch Cap

Price: ~$18-24

Fine-gauge knit with leather logo patch. Fold-over cuff with soft lining. Wheat classic beanie.

5. Amazon Essentials Knit Beanie 2-Pack

Price: ~$14-19

Soft acrylic knit with stretchy fit. Value 2-pack in solid colors. Black/grey budget beanies.

Fleece-Lined Winter Hats

6. Under Armour Men’s Tactical Stealth Beanie

Price: ~$22-28

Soft fleece lining with ColdGear fabric. Moisture-wicking with stretch construction. Black tactical beanie.

7. Minus33 Merino Wool Beanie

Price: ~$29-35

100% merino wool with natural odor resistance. Temperature regulating and moisture-wicking. Charcoal premium wool hat.

8. Smartwool Thermal Merino Beanie

Price: ~$32-38

ZQ-certified merino wool blend with slouchy fit. Naturally breathable and warm. Charcoal heather quality beanie.

Slouchy & Fashion Beanies

9. Slouchy Cable Knit Beanie Unisex

Price: ~$13-18

Oversized slouchy fit with cable knit pattern. Soft acrylic with fleece lining. Grey trendy winter hat.

10. UGG Oversized Knit Cuff Hat

Price: ~$38-48

Chunky knit with UGG logo patch. Oversized cuff with soft wool blend. Charcoal premium fashion beanie.

11. Patagonia Brodeo Beanie

Price: ~$29-35

Fair Trade Certified with recycled polyester blend. Classic fit with woven label. Black eco-friendly beanie.

Trapper & Ear Flap Hats

12. Tough Headwear Trapper Hat with Faux Fur

Price: ~$19-25

Quilted polyester with soft faux fur lining. Ear flaps with chin strap and visor. Black aviator trapper.

13. Carhartt Bubba Trapper Hat

Price: ~$24-32

Firm duck fabric with quilted nylon lining. Ear flaps snap up or tie down. Carhartt brown classic trapper.

14. The North Face Campshire Earflap Cap

Price: ~$38-48

High-pile fleece with adjustable toggles. Ear flaps with snap closures. TNF black cozy winter cap.

Performance & Active Winter Hats

15. Nike Dri-FIT Knit Running Beanie

Price: ~$22-28

Moisture-wicking Dri-FIT fabric with stretch fit. Reflective details for visibility. Black running beanie.

16. Outdoor Research Transcendent Beanie

Price: ~$34-44

650-fill down with Pertex Quantum shell. Packable and ultra-warm for extreme cold. Black insulated beanie.

Pom Pom & Stylish Options

17. Womens Winter Hat with Faux Fur Pom

Price: ~$16-22

Cable knit with oversized faux fur pom pom. Fleece-lined with stretchy fit. Beige fashion beanie.

18. Love Your Melon Cuffed Beanie

Price: ~$34-40

Premium acrylic knit with fold-over cuff. 50% of proceeds support pediatric cancer. Navy charity beanie.

Key Features to Consider:

  • Material Options: Acrylic affordable and easy care, wool naturally warm and breathable, fleece soft and moisture-wicking, merino premium temperature regulation
  • Fit Styles: Fitted beanies stay in place during activity, slouchy relaxed casual look, cuffed adds extra ear coverage
  • Warmth Level: Single-layer adequate for mild cold, fleece-lined for moderate cold, insulated/down for extreme conditions
  • Ear Coverage: Standard beanies cover ears when pulled down, ear flap hats offer maximum protection, trapper styles secure with straps
  • Activity Purpose: Running hats lightweight and moisture-wicking, work hats durable with hi-vis options, casual fashion-focused designs
  • Care Instructions: Machine washable convenient for regular use, hand wash preserves wool and delicate fabrics, air dry prevents shrinking
  • Head Size: Most beanies stretch to fit, measure circumference (21-24” adult average) for precise fit, adjustable trappers accommodate various sizes

All prices are approximate and may vary based on sales and availability.

Best Selling Adult Winter Boots

Men’s Insulated Winter Boots

1. Sorel Men’s Caribou Boot

Price: ~$139-179

Waterproof leather upper with 9mm removable liner. Rated to -40°F with seam-sealed construction. Buff classic snow boots.

2. Columbia Men’s Bugaboot III Snow Boot

Price: ~$89-119

Omni-Tech waterproof with 200g insulation. Omni-Heat reflective lining and Omni-Grip rubber outsole. Black/charcoal winter boots.

3. Timberland Men’s White Ledge Mid Waterproof Boot

Price: ~$89-119

Premium leather with seam-sealed waterproof construction. Rustproof hardware with rubber lug outsole. Wheat hiking-style winter boots.

4. The North Face Men’s Chilkat 400 Boot

Price: ~$119-149

400g Heatseeker insulation with TNF Winter Grip sole. Waterproof construction rated to -40°F. TNF black/grey snow boots.

5. Kamik Men’s Greenbay 4 Winter Boot

Price: ~$79-99

Waterproof with removable 8mm liner rated to -40°F. Adjustable snow collar with D-ring lacing. Black durable winter boots.

Women’s Winter Boots

6. Sorel Women’s Joan of Arctic Boot

Price: ~$149-199

Waterproof suede with faux fur cuff and trim. Removable 6mm liner rated to -25°F. Quarry grey iconic winter boots.

7. Columbia Women’s Ice Maiden II Snow Boot

Price: ~$69-89

Omni-Tech waterproof with 200g insulation. Omni-Grip advanced traction with lace-up closure. Black/shale affordable boots.

8. UGG Women’s Classic Short II Boot

Price: ~$159-189

Twin-face sheepskin with UGGpure wool lining. Treadlite by UGG outsole for comfort. Chestnut classic UGG boots.

9. The North Face Women’s Nuptse Purna II Boot

Price: ~$139-169

400g Heatseeker insulation with hydroseal waterproof. TNF Winter Grip outsole rated to -25°F. TNF black insulated boots.

10. Merrell Women’s Thermo Chill Boot

Price: ~$119-149

Waterproof with 200g insulation and fleece lining. M Select GRIP outsole with pull-on tab. Brindle mid-calf boots.

Duck & Pac Boots

11. L.L.Bean Men’s Bean Boots 10” Duck Boot

Price: ~$129-159

Rubber bottom with leather top and chain-tread sole. Removable insoles with rust-proof hardware. Tan/brown classic Maine boots.

12. Sperry Men’s Saltwater Duck Boot

Price: ~$99-129

Waterproof rubber shell with leather upper. Rawhide lacing with Wave-Siping outsole. Tan/brown nautical duck boots.

13. London Fog Women’s Whitley Duck Boot

Price: ~$54-74

Waterproof rubber with quilted nylon shaft. Lace-up with cozy fleece lining. Black/tan budget duck boots.

Lightweight & Packable Winter Boots

14. Bogs Men’s Classic High Insulated Boot

Price: ~$119-149

100% waterproof with 7mm Neo-Tech insulation. Comfort rated to -40°F with pull-on handles. Black easy-on boots.

15. Muck Boot Arctic Sport II Extreme Boot

Price: ~$129-159

8mm neoprene with fleece lining rated to -60°F. 100% waterproof with stretch-fit comfort. Black extreme cold boots.

Fashion & Casual Winter Boots

16. Steve Madden Women’s Troopa Boot

Price: ~$79-99

Combat-style with side zipper and lace-up front. Lightly padded insole with lug sole. Black leather fashion boots.

17. Dr. Martens 1460 8-Eye Boot

Price: ~$149-179

Smooth leather with air-cushioned sole. Goodyear welt construction with yellow stitching. Black iconic Doc Martens.

18. Bearpaw Women’s Emma Short Boot

Price: ~$69-89

Suede and wool blend with sheepskin footbed. Pull-on style with lightweight TPR sole. Hickory UGG-alternative boots.

Key Features to Consider:

  • Insulation Rating: 100-200g mild winters and active use, 400g moderate cold and snow, 600-1000g extreme cold or standing activities
  • Waterproof Technology: Sealed seams essential for deep snow, waterproof membranes (Gore-Tex) breathable, rubber boots 100% waterproof but less breathable
  • Height Options: Ankle boots (6-8”) everyday versatility, mid-calf (10-12”) snow protection, tall boots (14”+) deep snow and extreme cold
  • Temperature Rating: -10°F to -25°F typical winter boots, -40°F for severe cold, -60°F extreme conditions, consider wind chill factor
  • Traction Soles: Deep lugs prevent slipping on snow, rubber compounds stay flexible in cold, specialized winter grips for ice
  • Weight Considerations: Lightweight boots (2-3 lbs) for walking and activity, heavy boots (4-6 lbs) maximum insulation and durability
  • Sizing Tips: Order half size up for thick socks, ensure toe room when flexed, break in leather boots before winter, women’s sizes run smaller

All prices are approximate and may vary based on sales and availability.

Best Selling Table Lamps

LED Desk Lamps

1. TaoTronics LED Desk Lamp with USB Charging

Price: ~$39-49

5 color modes and 7 brightness levels with eye-care technology. USB charging port and memory function. Black adjustable desk lamp.

2. BenQ e-Reading LED Desk Lamp

Price: ~$139-179

Auto-dimming with wide adjustable light panel. Flicker-free and glare-free eye protection. Silver premium desk lamp.

3. SKYLEO LED Desk Lamp with Wireless Charging

Price: ~$29-39

Qi wireless charging pad with USB port. Adjustable brightness and color temperature. Black modern desk lamp.

4. Lepro LED Desk Lamp Architect Swing Arm

Price: ~$34-44

Clamp-on design with 3 color modes and memory. Energy-efficient 10W LED with metal construction. Black architect lamp.

5. Dyson Lightcycle Morph Desk Lamp

Price: ~$549-649

Intelligent light tracking with daylight simulation. 60-year lifespan with auto-dimming. White premium smart lamp.

Traditional Bedside Table Lamps

6. Haitral Modern Table Lamp Set of 2

Price: ~$39-49

Fabric drum shade with wooden base. On/off pull chain with E26 socket. Gray minimalist bedroom lamps.

7. Brightech Maxwell LED USB Bedside Lamp

Price: ~$44-54

Warm 3000K LED with USB charging port. Havana brown linen shade with wooden tripod. Mid-century modern lamp.

8. Simple Designs Chrome Mini Table Lamp Set

Price: ~$29-39

Purple fabric shade with chrome base set of 2. Compact 12” height for small spaces. Budget bedside lamps.

Touch Control & Smart Lamps

9. AUKEY Touch Control Table Lamp

Price: ~$29-39

Dimmable with RGB color changing modes. Touch sensitive with memory function. White modern touch lamp.

10. Philips Hue Go Portable Smart Lamp

Price: ~$74-94

Wireless with app and voice control. 16 million colors with Bluetooth. White portable smart lamp.

11. Govee Smart Table Lamp WiFi Alexa

Price: ~$39-49

App control with music sync and 16M colors. Alexa and Google Assistant compatible. White RGB smart lamp.

Himalayan Salt & Unique Lamps

12. Himalayan Glow Natural Salt Lamp

Price: ~$19-29

Hand-carved Himalayan pink salt crystal. Warm amber glow with wood base. Natural 6-8 lbs salt lamp.

13. Levitating Moon Lamp Floating

Price: ~$59-79

Magnetic levitation with 3D printed moon design. LED with 360-degree rotation. Wooden base novelty lamp.

Industrial & Minimalist Lamps

14. Tomons Swing Arm Desk Lamp Wood

Price: ~$34-44

Scandinavian design with adjustable arm. Natural wood with fabric shade. Minimalist reading lamp.

15. LEPOWER Metal Desk Lamp Architect

Price: ~$24-34

Swing arm with clamp base. Classic architect style with on/off switch. Black industrial desk lamp.

Key Features to Consider:

  • Light Color Temperature: 2700K warm white for relaxation, 4000K neutral for general tasks, 5000-6500K cool white for focus and productivity
  • Brightness Levels: 300-500 lumens adequate for ambient, 800-1200 lumens task lighting, dimmable offers flexibility for different activities
  • Bulb Type: LED energy-efficient lasting 25,000+ hours, incandescent warm traditional glow, CFL compact fluorescent budget option
  • Adjustability: Fixed shades limit direction, swing-arm allows positioning, multi-joint architect lamps offer maximum flexibility
  • Smart Features: WiFi/Bluetooth app control, voice assistant integration, scheduling automation, color-changing RGB for ambiance
  • Eye Protection: Flicker-free reduces eye strain, anti-glare diffusers prevent harsh shadows, auto-dimming adjusts to ambient light
  • Style Considerations: Modern minimalist fits contemporary decor, traditional fabric shades suit classic rooms, industrial metal complements lofts

All prices are approximate and may vary based on sales and availability.
